'''Knowledge tree''' is a tree structure in which all [[element]]s of a SuperMemo [[Glossary:collection|collection]] are organized. The '''knowledge tree''' is presented in the [[contents window]] ('''Contents'''). Particular nodes of the tree can hold up to a thousand children each, but for performance reasons it is recommended to keep no more than a hundred children elements in a single node. Some authors use the term ''knowledge hierarchy'' to refer to the knowledge tree. For more, see: [[Building_the_knowledge_tree|Knowledge tree in SuperMemo]]
